lines.english: Do you think that the writer passed his driving test? Why?
lines.chinese: 你认为作者通过驾照考试了吗？为什么？
lines.raw: Do you think that the writer passed his driving test? Why? | 你认为作者通过驾照考试了吗？为什么？

lines.english: I was being tested for a driving licence for the third time.
lines.chinese: 我第三次参加驾驶执照考试。
lines.raw: I was being tested for a driving licence for the third time. | 我第三次参加驾驶执照考试。

lines.english: I had been asked to drive in heavy traffic and had done so successfully.
lines.chinese: 我被要求在车辆很多的道路上驾驶，并成功完成了。
lines.raw: I had been asked to drive in heavy traffic and had done so successfully. | 我被要求在车辆很多的道路上驾驶，并成功完成了。

lines.english: After having been instructed to drive out of town, I began to acquire confidence.
lines.chinese: 在被指示开出市区后，我开始有了信心。
lines.raw: After having been instructed to drive out of town, I began to acquire confidence. | 在被指示开出市区后，我开始有了信心。

lines.english: Sure that I had passed, I was almost beginning to enjoy my test.
lines.chinese: 确信我已通过，我几乎开始享受我的考试了。
lines.raw: Sure that I had passed, I was almost beginning to enjoy my test. | 确信我已通过，我几乎开始享受我的考试了。

lines.english: The examiner must have been pleased with my performance, for he smiled and said, 'Just one more thing Mr. Eames.
lines.chinese: 考官一定对我的表现很满意，因为他微笑着说：“还有一件事，伊姆斯先生。
lines.raw: The examiner must have been pleased with my performance, for he smiled and said, 'Just one more thing Mr. Eames. | 考官一定对我的表现很满意，因为他微笑着说：“还有一件事，伊姆斯先生。

lines.english: Let us suppose that a child suddenly crosses the road in front of you.
lines.chinese: 假设有个孩子突然从你车前跑过。
lines.raw: Let us suppose that a child suddenly crosses the road in front of you. | 假设有个孩子突然从你车前跑过。

lines.english: As soon as I tap on the window, you must stop within five feet.'
lines.chinese: 我一敲车窗，你必须在五英尺内把车停住。”
lines.raw: As soon as I tap on the window, you must stop within five feet.' | 我一敲车窗，你必须在五英尺内把车停住。”

lines.english: I continued driving and after some time, the examiner tapped loudly.
lines.chinese: 我继续驾驶，过了一会儿，考官大声敲击车窗。
lines.raw: I continued driving and after some time, the examiner tapped loudly. | 我继续驾驶，过了一会儿，考官大声敲击车窗。

lines.english: Though the sound could be heard clearly, it took me a long time to react.
lines.chinese: 尽管声音听得很清楚，但我过了好一会儿才做出反应。
lines.raw: Though the sound could be heard clearly, it took me a long time to react. | 尽管声音听得很清楚，但我过了好一会儿才做出反应。

lines.english: I suddenly pressed the brake pedal hard and we were both thrown forward.
lines.chinese: 我猛地踩下刹车踏板，结果我们俩都被猛地向前甩去。
lines.raw: I suddenly pressed the brake pedal hard and we were both thrown forward. | 我猛地踩下刹车踏板，结果我们俩都被猛地向前甩去。

lines.english: The examiner looked at me sadly.
lines.raw: The examiner looked at me sadly. | 考官悲伤地看着我。

lines.english: 'Mr. Eames,' he said, in a mournful voice, 'you have just killed that child!'
lines.chinese: “伊姆斯先生，”他用悲哀的声音说，“你刚才把那个孩子撞死了！”
lines.raw: 'Mr. Eames,' he said, in a mournful voice, 'you have just killed that child!' | “伊姆斯先生，”他用悲哀的声音说，“你刚才把那个孩子撞死了！”
